creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
/latest build for -CURRENT is in a hanged state since 2017-12-02 12:20:14 UTC. It's not clear if this was caused by kernel panic or something else. 

/latest build for 11.1-RELEASE is currently against ports r454917 snapshot, which is more than 3 weeks old. The build just started and has 26255 packages in queue because the previous one hanged as well.

Can you stop both in order for the next build at 2017-12-18 01:00 UTC to be in sync with amd64/i386?

cf. http://thunderx1.nyi.freebsd.org/
